title: tetrastigma obtectum
intro: Tetrastigma obtectum, also known as Chinese grapevine or Chinese woodbine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Vitaceae. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. Tetrastigma obtectum is often prepared as a tea, extract, or tincture for its herbal uses, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as an ingredient in various formulations.
